# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of Neu21Plus receive security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

Note: This is a community port of NotEnoughUpdates. Only the Neu21Plus (Fabric 26.1) versions listed above are supported for security fixes. The original NEU (Forge 1.8.9) has its own security policy.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Neu21Plus:

1. **Do NOT open a public GitHub issue** for security vulnerabilities.
2. Please report it privately by:
   - Opening a GitHub Security Advisory: [New Security Advisory](https://github.com/BS-Ji-007/Neu21plus/security/advisories/new)
   - Or contacting the maintainers via GitHub Discussions
3. Include the following information:
   - Description of the vulnerability
   - Steps to reproduce
   - Affected versions
   - Potential impact
   - Any suggested fixes (optional)

You can expect a response within 48 hours. We will keep you updated on the progress of fixing the vulnerability and will credit you in the advisory unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

## Security Best Practices

When using Neu21Plus:
- Only download the mod from official sources (GitHub Releases, Modrinth)
- Verify checksums when downloading from third-party sources
- Never share your Hypixel API key or session tokens
- Keep the mod updated to the latest version
